The [[Gee-Tech]] '''No. 12 "Defender" MicroBlaster''' was a disposable [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]]. It was primarily designed as a weapon for a surprise attack or distraction. It had almost no range or power and could not be recharged or reloaded.

{{Weapon-stub}}
